[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 1110101 5
2 0110011 4
3 0011000 2
4 0111011 5
5 0011101 4
6 1111001 5
7 0001111 4

01 10 0111011 5 match 4
12 21 0111111 6
23 32 1111101 6
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1101111 6
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1110111 6
70 07 0111011 5 match 4

13 31 1111011 6
24 42 0011111 5
35 53 1111011 6
46 64 1111111 a
57 75 1111011 6
60 06 1111101 6
71 17 0111011 5 match 4

36 63 1111101 6

50 05 1111010 5

72 27 0111111 6
